message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame skew + kurtosis (2 cases)

Append 2 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame statistical
moments:

- skew_basic: 5-row 2-col, 'a' is symmetric (skew~=0), 'b' has an
  extreme outlier driving high positive skew
- kurtosis_basic: same pattern with one-row outlier in middle, 'a'
  uniform low kurtosis, 'b' high kurtosis from the spike

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.skew()/.kurtosis() and emits expected_series), runs the Rust
DataFrame.skew_agg()/.kurtosis_agg(), and asserts parity via
compare_series_expected. DataFrameSkew / DataFrameKurtosis were
already wired through the Series response branch; this fills the
live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-qtvt8]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
